candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicit operating amortization tied to Cost of Revenues and shown as a separate line outside the selected COGS row 'Materials and services', so it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in the selected COGS bucket.
Generic depreciation is shown separately, but it is not explicitly tied to Cost of Revenues; the more specific COGS-related amortization row is the better match for COGS D&A.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues

variables.notes: Selected only the explicit Cost of Revenues amortization line. Did not use broader depreciation/impairment rows to avoid mixing in non-COGS amounts and impairment.

candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation line shown outside the selected XSGA buckets ('Personnel expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'), so it appears to be an additional overhead D&A amount that should be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation component, likely overhead/SG&A-related, and not embedded in the selected XSGA rows. It sits as a component under the broader depreciation section, so it may need separate addition if the summary row is not used.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This row is explicitly tied to Cost of Revenues, not SG&A, so it should not be mapped to XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: MANUALLY CHANGED. Used the separate depreciation component rows rather than 'Depreciation and impairment' because the summary includes impairment and also appears to include COGS-related amortization, which would risk double counting and bucket contamination.
